info.title: FitCure / take.health API
info.description:
Production REST API for the **FitCure / take.health** AI healthcare platform.

This specification covers **every endpoint actually used by the web client
(`client/src`)** and verified against the live backend (`server/routes` +
`server/controllers`). Use it as the single source of truth when building
the Flutter mobile app or any third-party integration.

## Highlights

* **Auth** — JWT Bearer, 30-day expiry, OTP-based registration, password
  reset via 4-digit email code.
* **AI** — Lab-report analysis, food image scan, personalised diet plans,
  glucose-trend insights, multilingual translation (Hindi default), AI
  chat coach.
* **Health data** — Reports, glucose / HbA1c / weight / BP / HR metrics,
  nutrition logs, water / weight tracking, wearable device sync.
* **Doctors** — Discovery, booking, video consultations, prescriptions,
  reviews, full doctor workspace under `/doctors/me/*`.
* **Admin** — Full web-only dashboard suite (mobile clients can ignore).

See `README.md` next to this file for environment URLs, conventions,
Flutter codegen instructions, and known quirks.

servers.description: LAN dev (testing from a physical phone)

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health-check, ping and diagnostics. Useful as a connectivity probe from mobile.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration (with OTP), login, logout, password reset, profile retrieval.

tags.name: User Profile
tags.description: Authenticated user profile, food preferences, subscription details.

tags.name: Health Reports
tags.description: Upload lab reports → AI analysis → history, comparisons, per-report chat.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregated dashboard, Health DNA, daily progress, challenges, smoking log, AI chat.

tags.name: Health Metrics
tags.description: Log and read glucose, HbA1c, weight, blood pressure, heart-rate readings.

tags.name: Nutrition
tags.description: AI food analysis, meal logging, daily / weekly summaries, water & weight logs, goals.

tags.name: Quick Food Check
tags.description: One-shot AI scan of a food (text or image) — does NOT log it as a meal.

tags.name: Diet Plan & Supplements
tags.description: AI-generated personalised diet plans and supplement recommendations.

tags.name: Doctors
tags.description: Public doctor discovery + patient-side booking and appointment management.

tags.name: Video Consultation
tags.description: Start / end / summarise an appointment, submit a review, download prescription.

tags.name: Doctor Workspace
tags.description: Endpoints under `/doctors/me/*`. Only callable by users with the `doctor` role.

tags.name: Wearables
tags.description: Connect smart-watch / fitness device, sync daily metrics, heart-rate, sleep.

tags.name: Medical Documents
tags.description: Secure cloud vault for prescriptions, scans, insurance, etc.

tags.name: AI Coach Chat
tags.description: General-purpose AI health coach with conversation history.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app notifications inbox.

tags.name: Translation
tags.description: AI-powered text translation (default target = Hindi).

tags.name: Food Safety
tags.description: Curated food adulteration / safety database (no auth required).

tags.name: Support
tags.description: User-side support ticket creation; admin response endpoints.

tags.name: Admin - Stats
tags.description: Admin dashboard metrics. Requires `admin` role.

tags.name: Admin - Users
tags.description: Admin user management. Requires `admin` role.

tags.name: Admin - Reports
tags.description: Admin report oversight. Requires `admin` role.

tags.name: Admin - Doctors
tags.description: Admin doctor management & approval workflow. Requires `admin` role.

tags.name: Admin - Diet & Supplements
tags.description: Admin curation of diet templates, deficiency rules, supplement mappings.

tags.name: Admin - Food Cache
tags.description: Admin curation of the global food intelligence cache.

tags.name: Admin - Activity Logs
tags.description: User activity audit trail and live-user telemetry.

get.description:
Lightweight liveness probe. Returns API info and current MongoDB
connection state. **Does NOT require authentication.**
Returns `pong`. Use to validate the base URL from a Flutter app at startup.
Internal — returns the result of three sequential DB probes. **Do not call from mobile clients.**

post.description:
Sends a **6-digit email OTP** that must be provided in the subsequent
`/auth/register` call. The OTP expires in 15 minutes.

Final registration step. Requires the **6-digit OTP** obtained from
`/auth/register-otp`. On success returns the user object **with a JWT
token** — store it and use it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

Creates a user with `role=doctor` and an associated doctor profile in
`pending` approval status. The doctor cannot be booked until an admin
approves them.

schema.description: Provide either `email` or `phone` — not both required.

post.description: Backend logs the logout activity. The client should still drop the JWT locally.

put.description:
Sends a partial user document. Server merges `profile.*`, recalculates
BMI when height/weight change, and updates the associated `HealthGoal`
if a `nutritionGoal` is included.

post.description:
Multipart upload. The image is stored on Cloudinary and the URL is set
on `user.profilePicture`.

200.description: Subscription block from the user document
Stored preferences (empty object if never set)

post.summary: Upload a lab report for AI analysis
post.description:
Multipart upload (PDF, image, or text). Returns **immediately** with
`backgroundProcessing: true`; the AI runs in the background. Poll
`GET /health/reports/{id}/status` until `status === "completed"`.

Set a generous client timeout (≥ 150 s) — even though processing is
async, the validation step can take ~30 s.

report.description: PDF / JPEG / PNG / TXT lab report

manualText.description: Optional plain text content (used when the file isn't a parseable PDF).

get.description: Returns all non-failed reports sorted by `createdAt desc`.

get.summary: Get a single report (with doctor recommendations)

get.description:
Returns the current status of background analysis. Reports stuck in
`processing` for > 10 minutes are auto-marked `failed`.

get.summary: Compare this report with the previous same-type report

post.summary: Chat with AI about this specific report

message.example: What does my low Vitamin D mean?

post.summary: Re-run AI analysis on an existing report

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: Filter to a single report type (e.g. `blood`, `lipid`).

get.summary: List the last 10 completed reports (for comparison UI)

get.description:
Heavy aggregation endpoint. Combines reports, wearable history, food
logs, glucose readings and goals into a single payload that powers the
main dashboard screen.

**Do not poll** — the response is cached for 120 s.
AI-generated wellness identity. Cached server-side for 24 hours.

schema.description: AI-generated DNA (shape is dynamic — render fields as returned).

post.summary: Save / upsert a day's progress score
Lightweight AI Q&A (also used by Smoke Tracker)
post.description:
Direct Anthropic Claude call with the user's latest report summary as
context. Use this for short Q&A or specific tracker hints. For the
full conversational coach use `POST /chat`.

post.summary: Get human-friendly explanation of a lab metric

get.summary: List metrics of a given type (latest first)
Latest reading for each requested type

get.description:
Combines recent glucose readings, the latest HbA1c, and today's food
log to produce a structured AI insight. Result is **cached server-side
per data-hash** so token usage stays low.

post.summary: AI analyse a food (text or base64 image)
post.description:
Used by the meal-logging flow to compute calories, macros,
micronutrients, warnings and alternatives **before** the user logs the
meal. The result is also stored in the global food cache for faster
future lookups.

schema.description: At least one of `foodDescription` / `imageBase64` is required.

post.summary: One-shot AI food check (image multipart **or** text JSON)
post.description:
Same engine as `/nutrition/analyze-food` but persisted as a
`QuickFoodCheck` document and **not** counted in the daily meal log.
Used by the "Snap & Check" screen.

Accepts either multipart (image upload) or `application/json`.

delete.summary: Delete a Quick Food Check entry

get.summary: Get all Quick Food Check entries for a given date
get.description:
Returns every Quick Food Check the user performed on the supplied
date, plus the aggregated daily stats used by the dashboard widget.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to *today* if omitted.

post.summary: Log a meal (added to daily totals)

get.summary: List food logs for a specific date

put.summary: Update an existing food log (e.g. change meal type)

get.summary: Resolve a food name to a cover image URL
get.description: Used by the diet-plan UI to display nice thumbnails next to suggested foods.

post.summary: Generate a personalised AI diet plan
post.description:
Kicks off background generation. Poll
`/diet-recommendations/diet-plan/{planId}/status` until
`status === "completed"`, then fetch via `/diet-plan/active` or
`/diet-plan/{planId}`.

Body is optional — server uses the latest user profile + reports if no
overrides are sent.

schema.description: Optional overrides; all fields fallback to user profile.

dietPlan.description: `null` when the user has no active plan.

post.summary: Rate a diet plan (1 – 5) with optional feedback
Generate AI supplement recommendations from latest reports

get.summary: Get the active supplement recommendation set

recommendations.description: `null` when no active supplement recommendations exist.

post.summary: Log that a supplement was taken

get.summary: Get doctors recommended for a list of specializations

403.description: You are not patient or doctor on this appointment

post.summary: Submit a review for the doctor (patient only)

get.summary: Get a doctor's available time slots for the next 7 days
Check if a specific slot is available

blockedSlots.description: Map of `YYYY-MM-DD → array of HH:mm strings`

get.summary: Get a patient's full profile (for consultation)

parameters.name: appointmentId
parameters.description: Required for authorization — must belong to the requesting doctor.

get.summary: Get appointments by doctor ID (admin-style view)
List my connected (or previously connected) devices

post.summary: Sync (or upsert) daily metrics for a device

isAdditive.description: When `true`, server **adds** to existing values for that date instead of replacing.

post.summary: Inject demo wearable data (for first-run onboarding)

get.summary: List my documents (vault + analysed lab reports)

post.description:
Heavy AI endpoint that injects the user's profile, latest reports,
today's nutrition, today's activity and active diet plan into the
prompt. Use for the dedicated chat screen.

For the diabetes-specific glycemic predictor behaviour see the
backend system prompt — it is automatically activated when the user
profile indicates diabetes.

query.example: I just ate 2 rotis with dal — how will my sugar respond?

post.summary: Append messages to chat history (capped at 100)

get.description: Optimised for polling — does **not** trigger auto-logout on 401.

post.description: **No authentication required.** Translates lab-report text, AI explanations, etc.

get.summary: Get safety record for a specific food

patch.summary: Approve / reject a diet plan template

get.summary: Get schedule utilisation stats for a doctor

bearerAuth.description:
Standard JWT issued by `/auth/login` or `/auth/register`. Include in
every protected request:

`Authorization: Bearer <token>`

blockedSlots.description: Map of `YYYY-MM-DD → array of HH:mm strings`

isAnalyzedReport.description: True when this row was projected from a HealthReport, not the documents collection.
